_doc: v1.1 edge-case demo records (separate file; survives reseed). A DRAFT PO to a SUSPENDED supplier (to demonstrate the suspended-supplier-blocks-issue guard), and a return in INITIATED state (to demonstrate authorize vs decline / re-disposition).

purchaseOrders.note: Draft PO to a suspended supplier — issue is blocked until the supplier is reinstated.

returns.productCondition: Cartons crushed in transit; partial lot affected
